Summary

Discussion

Open question 1 · opinion

Do you think Nvidia’s huge AI sales forecast sounds realistic or too ambitious? Why?

Open question 2 · personal experience

Have you ever seen a live event, speech, or presentation where something unexpected happened? What was it like?

Open question 3 · comparison

How is a live robot demo on a stage different from a video demo that has been edited first?

Open question 4 · opinion

Why do you think so many people pay attention when Jensen Huang speaks at GTC?

Open question 5 · opinion

If you were a company deciding whether to buy AI chips or build a new AI system, what would you want to know first?
